questionEN: A developer needs to run the app without a physical device. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да стартира app без физическо устройство. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Simulator позволява бързо тестване на device-like среда.
explanationEN: Simulator is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to store app images and colors. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази app images и colors. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Assets catalog организира images, colors и app icons.
explanationEN: Assets catalog is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to identify the app uniquely. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да идентифицира app-а уникално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Bundle identifier е уникалното име на app-а в системата и App Store.
explanationEN: Bundle identifier is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to show the launch screen. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да покаже launch screen. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Launch screen се показва при стартиране, докато app-ът се подготвя.
explanationEN: Launch screen is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to test pre-release builds externally. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да тества pre-release builds външно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: TestFlight позволява beta разпространение към testers.
explanationEN: TestFlight is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to manage store listing and builds. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да управлява store listing и builds. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: App Store Connect управлява metadata, builds и releases.
explanationEN: App Store Connect is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to store small non-sensitive settings. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази малки нечувствителни настройки. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: UserDefaults е подходящ за малки локални preferences.
explanationEN: UserDefaults is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to store secrets or tokens securely. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да пази secrets или tokens сигурно. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Keychain е предназначен за sensitive credentials.
explanationEN: Keychain is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to request camera permission text. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да добави текст за camera permission. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Permission dialogs изискват usage description в Info.plist.
explanationEN: Info.plist privacy key is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to keep apps isolated from each other. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да държи apps изолирани един от друг. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: iOS sandbox ограничава достъпа на app-а до неговите данни.
explanationEN: Sandbox is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to debug memory growth visually. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да debug-не memory growth визуално. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Memory graph помага да се видят reference cycles и задържани objects.
explanationEN: Memory graph is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to profile CPU and leaks. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да профилира CPU и leaks. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Instruments анализира runtime performance и memory поведение.
explanationEN: Instruments is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to support opening from a custom URL. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да поддържа отваряне от custom URL. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: URL schemes позволяват app launch чрез custom URL pattern.
explanationEN: URL schemes is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to open content from a web link. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да отваря content от web link. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Universal Links свързват website URLs директно с app content.
explanationEN: Universal Links is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to declare special system capabilities. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да декларира специални system capabilities. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Entitlements разрешават capabilities като iCloud или push notifications.
explanationEN: Entitlements is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to prepare signing for device install. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да подготви signing за device install. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Provisioning profile свързва app ID, certificate и devices/capabilities.
explanationEN: Provisioning profile is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to handle multiple window scenes. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да обработи multiple window scenes. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Scene lifecycle управлява UI lifecycle за window scenes.
explanationEN: Scene lifecycle is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to receive remote alerts. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да получи remote alerts. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Push notifications доставят съобщения от server към device.
explanationEN: Push notifications is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to avoid insecure network defaults. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да избегне insecure network defaults. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: App Transport Security насърчава secure HTTPS connections.
explanationEN: ATS is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to document required-reason APIs. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да документира required-reason APIs. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Privacy manifest описва data collection и required-reason API употреба.
explanationEN: Privacy manifest is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.

questionEN: A developer needs to support background audio or fetch. Which choice is best?
questionBG: Developer трябва да поддържа background audio или fetch. Кой избор е най-подходящ?
explanationBG: Background modes декларират разрешени background behaviors.
explanationEN: Background modes is the best fit here because it directly supports the described iOS Development workflow.
